test_refs: independent: schedule-graph.py current/stale Beads parity probes
IN1.observed: Independent 2026-07-20 audit confirmed incomplete gates admit 0 nodes. In mixed Beads/GitHub/none probes, Beads was admitted only when receipt graph_status/graph_depends_on exactly matched the current node; a stale dependency receipt was excluded with beads_parity_stale_or_unconfirmed. 2026-07-22 追記 (IN1 本文へ graph 全体 digest 突合の停止条件を写像): parity_provenance 欠落と source_graph_digest 不一致がいずれも ContractError で schedule を停止させ、推薦を 1 件も出さないことを test_c16_schedule_stops_on_missing_or_stale_parity_provenance が固定。回復経路として build-parity-manifest.py の出力が C28 の由来検査と C16 の canonical digest 突合をそのまま通ることを test_builder_output_satisfies_c28_provenance_and_c16_digest が固定し、停止条件に出口があることを機械検証した。

test_refs: independent: fresh evaluator replay of r6 task, pane, execution receipt, graph, and canonical lease ledger
OUT1.observed: 回復手順を 2 段 (build-parity-manifest.py での manifest 再生成 + bd-bridge.py --op ready での C28 receipt 取り直し) へ是正したことで宣言済み挙動閉包 digest が動いたため 2026-07-22 に再実走 (r8)。対象 Skill を Skill tool で起動し、R3-schedule と C17 verifier をそれぞれ別 Agent へ分離 (C17 は dev-graph-parallel-safety-verifier)。read-only receipt は LT-TASK-001 を唯一の ready task とし、未充足依存 0・lease/resource conflict 0・一意な branch/claim hint・graph/tracker/lease digest 不変。fresh evaluator が fixture の graph/lease へ shasum を自ら実行して receipt の before/after 双方と一致することを確認し、goal-seek の hash 検査スクリプトも 再実行して PASS。独立 verifier receipt は verified=true (13 checks)。

OUT2.observed: Independent audit and focused tests confirmed conflict-free batches, scope/max limits, expired-lease exclusion, and graph/tracker/lease digest stability. A rogue lease path in a Git repository and an eval-log symlink root were rejected before output; only git-common-dir/dev-graph/leases.json was accepted as authority.
